mems.content: Doc-tool hardening confirmed root cause: hivemind_doc.create accepts content but handleCreate ignores it, so createDocument only writes a title stub. Phase next: plan, then TDD for persisted content, format-aware validation, and verification receipts.

First doc-tool hardening slice is implemented and directly verified: createDocument now persists markdown body content, validates JSON create content, and returns a read-after-write receipt surfaced by hivemind_doc.create. Broader compatibility verification is blocked by a missing src/lib/planning-materializer module referenced by tests/planning-materializer-doc-intel.test.ts.
